para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: APA-0226 / P.No.59 (Part-I) / PAPU-15
For immediate and effective implementation of the transfer order, the following instructions shall be given:
Strictly follow: -
The said Assistant Geologist should be relieved immediately.
Officers with 2.बदल should immediately report to the office mentioned in RAKANA No. 4.
Report as such by the Commissioner, Ground Water Surveillance and Development Agency.
Submit to the government without delay. The officer transferred is at the place of transfer.
Maharashtra Civil Service (Discipline and Discipline) against him if found not to have joined.
Disciplinary action will be taken as per the provisions of the Appeal) Rules, 1979.
The transferred officers should be engaged without delay. to an officer.
Salaries and allowances without work, with a mandatory waiting period due to non-employment
To the head of the office concerned and to the officer of the establishment, if the occasion arises for the payment.
will be held accountable.
Officers being posted under the command of 3.सदरह
It is necessary to join immediately at the place of posting.
4.उपर Since the said changes are being made at the request of the concerned, they will have to
The duration of the assignment as well as any type of travel to join the place of transfer
No allowances or incidental allowances shall be admissible.
These orders will come into effect immediately. Related officers transferred
Regarding the immediate submission of information to the government as to whether or how they have joined the office.
The Commissioner, Ground Water Surveillance and Development Mechanism is being intimated.
